leadText: Wildbolt Storm (Japanese: かみなりあらし Thunderous Storm) is a damage-dealing Electric-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It is the signature move of Thundurus.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Wildbolt Storm inflicts damage and has a 30% chance of paralyzing the target. Pokémon Legends: Arceus Category Special PP 5 Agile Strong Power 95 75 115 Accuracy 80% 80% 90% Action speed modifier Self 0 0 +5 Target 0 +3 0 Additional effect Chance 30% 30% 50% Turns 3 2 4 ? ? Inflicts the target with paralysis Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Wildbolt Storm's PP and power were changed to 10 and 100, respectively. It now has a 20% chance of paralyzing each target. In a battle with multiple opponents, Wildbolt Storm will target all adjacent opponents. When used during rain , Wildbolt Storm bypasses accuracy checks to always hit, unless the target is in the semi-invulnerable turn of a move such as Dig or Fly . Wildbolt Storm is a wind move .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description LA The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave the target with paralysis. S V The user summons a thunderous tempest and savagely attacks with lightning and wind. This may also leave opposing Pokémon with paralysis.
